acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md has a 0.6.0 section containing the #11 /rigor:assess entry and no Unreleased section remains.
The committed dist/rigor.cjs is byte-identical to a fresh build and .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs is byte-identical to dist/rigor.cjs.
npm run test:all, npm run bench, claude plugin validate . --strict, and git diff --check pass.
rigor release-check --version 0.6.0 passes on the merged main commit before any tag is created.
constraints: No source, schema, skill, or test changes in this release commit.
The release commit reaches main only through a protected pull request with required checks green; never a direct push.
Tag and publish only after rigor release-check reports overall passed on the merged main SHA.
